headline: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Says Iran Deal Announcement 'Shortly' With Hormuz 'Opened'; Tesla, AI Stocks Near Buy Points
summary: President Donald Trump said Saturday that the U.S. and Iran are close to an interim deal that will open the Strait of Hormuz.

headline: Dow Jones Futures: Market Bets On Iran Deal; Tesla, These Five AI Plays Are At Buy Points

headline: AXT Inc. (AXTI) on All-Time High Ahead of Earnings Outcome on Thursday
summary: AXT Inc. (NASDAQ:AXTI) is one of the 10 Stocks Effortlessly Climbing Double-Digits.
